title: Publishing Protocols on protocols.io
author: Anita Broellochs
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.si8echw

steps.instruction: Find the PUBLISH on the protocol page (in view mode): a
If you are ready to publish your protocol, click the 'PUBLISH' button.
A new window will open up: a

Select one of the following options for the protocol you are going to publish: Working In development Other Also, add an explanation for your choice. a This will help other scientists who are viewing your protocol to understand what to expect by executing your protocol.
Confirm that your co-authors and supervisor agree to the publication and that you understand that the protocol will be published and permanently available by checking the boxes: a

Please add all authors who contributed to this protocol by typing their names (separated by commas) into the text field and then clicking ' ADD ' or add yourself as an author by clicking ' add myself as an author '. Please also add the affiliation of each author. If an author has a profile on protocols.io, you can add them by typing their name into the text box and selecting the profile from the drop-down that automatically shows up.
Select if your protocol is a Research protocol or a Non-research protocol . a
This is the final step where you click 'PUBLISH' to make your protocol publicly available on protocols.io . a
